name: Brazilian Black Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the beans and soak them overnight in water.
2. Drain the beans and place them in a saucepan with 3 1/2 cups of chicken stock (or water).
3. In a separate pan, heat olive oil and sauté onion until softened.
4. Add garlic, carrot, celery, coriander, cumin, orange juice, dry sherry, black pepper, red pepper flakes, lemon juice, and salt to the pan with onion.
5. Pour the contents of this pan into the saucepan with the beans and stock.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover and simmer over very low heat for 1 1/2 hours until the beans are tender.
7. Add the remaining ingredients (lemon juice and salt) and let simmer for another 10 minutes.
8. Use an immersion blender to puree some of the beans to thicken the soup.
9. Serve topped with sour cream or yogurt.
